test_cases.input: User wants to initialize a brand new documentation library for their project.
test_cases.expected_behavior: The agent should recommend creating the specialized subdirectories (core, features, components, database, logic, logs) and bootstrap 00-system-index.md with a Mermaid diagram, links to indices, and a summary overview of all core docs.
assertions: Recommends creating the required folders under /docs
Includes a core docs summary/overview in the seeded 00-system-index.md
Spawns category index files (features-index.md, components-index.md, database-index.md, logic-index.md)

test_cases.input: User wants to create a new UI component documentation file for a primary button.
test_cases.expected_behavior: The agent should suggest creating 'docs/components/ui-button.md' and follow the 'ui-' prefix convention and standard YAML frontmatter anatomy.
assertions: Defines physical path and relationships in the markdown anatomy

test_cases.input: User asks where the design tokens and HSL color values belong.
test_cases.expected_behavior: The agent should direct them to '06-design-system.md' as the single source of truth for design decisions.

test_cases.input: User asks where the in-app AI prompt templates and model workflows live.
test_cases.expected_behavior: The agent should point to '09-ai-features.md' as the canonical home for user-facing AI capabilities, not agentic build protocols.
assertions: Distinguishes from developer/agent protocols like GEMINI.md
